title: Vision Guide Overview
description:
Vision Guide Overview

Vision Guide Overview

In this section we will focus on some concepts and definitions so you can gain a complete understanding of Vision Guide and its components. We will cover the following:

Basic definitions which you should understand to use Vision Guide
How to start Vision Guide from EPSON RC+
An explanation of the Vision Guide Vision Window
An introduction to all the Vision objects and the buttons on the toolbar to manipulate them
An introduction to Properties and Results while explaining the Object and Sequence Windows
How to execute a vision object or a vision sequence and an explanation when to use each
